sections.paragraph:
κατακάλυψις, εως, ἡ (s. prec. entry; Περὶ ὕψους 17, 3; Galen XIII 99 K.; XIX 445; Proclus, In Pla., Tim. III p. 149, 17 Diehl) covering ἐν μίτρᾳ ἦν ἡ κ. αὐτῆς her head was covered with a snood Hv 4, 2, 1.

prec. prec. = preceding

Galen Galen , II a.d.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Diehl Diehl , ed., s. AnthLG—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 517
